lines.text: Hehe, don't spoil my secret so soon. It's not every day I get such a charming visitor.
lines.quest_name: The Sacred Breeze So Often Breathes

lines.text: Besides, only by "hiding" oneself can the true beauty of a mask be revealed, don't you think?
lines.quest_name: The Sacred Breeze So Often Breathes

lines.text: Hmm? That's quite a detailed description, even covering the smallest intricacies... I admit, I'm surprised.
lines.quest_name: The Sacred Breeze So Often Breathes

lines.text: Not long ago, we customized a mask just like the one you've described.
lines.quest_name: The Sacred Breeze So Often Breathes

lines.text: If the Carnevale is a dream shared by all Ragunnesi, then a well-crafted mask is the key to it.
lines.quest_name: The Sacred Breeze So Often Breathes

lines.text: When faces are hidden, souls break free from the shackles of everyday life. That's why we love balls and plays, eagerly awaiting the Carnevale.
lines.quest_name: The Sacred Breeze So Often Breathes

lines.text: Masks liberate our spirits. We believe they reveal what lies within. It is our honor to help our customers express their innermost selves.
lines.quest_name: The Sacred Breeze So Often Breathes

lines.text: So, are you certain you want to custom order this particular mask?
lines.quest_name: The Sacred Breeze So Often Breathes
The Sacred Breeze So Often Breathes

lines.text: Yes, they're one of the oldest families in Rinascita. Their ancestors once ignited a war here, but they were defeated and driven out of Ragunna.
lines.quest_name: The Sacred Breeze So Often Breathes

lines.text: They show new ambitions. Lately, they've taken to more prominent roles in the city, flaunting their mining ventures and acting with increasing arrogance.
lines.quest_name: The Sacred Breeze So Often Breathes

lines.text: Speaking of which, I revised Monsieur Gilberto's mask twenty-three times…
lines.quest_name: The Sacred Breeze So Often Breathes

lines.text: Anyway, given your standing with the Montellis, I'd advise against this design.
lines.quest_name: The Sacred Breeze So Often Breathes

lines.text: Rumor has it the Montellis plan to push for Reserved Echoes at the Carnevale. It's stirred tension with the Fisalia family. Best avoid any association.
lines.quest_name: The Sacred Breeze So Often Breathes

lines.text: That incident with the Montelli's Echoes going berserk... Unfortunate timing. Who knows how this will affect their promotion.
lines.quest_name: The Sacred Breeze So Often Breathes

lines.text: Hehe, you're too polite, Mademoiselle Zani. You're my special guest, after all.
lines.quest_name: The Sacred Breeze So Often Breathes

lines.text: Isn't it interesting how a small mask can both hide and reveal? I can't wait to see the "face" you'll choose to show.
lines.quest_name: The Sacred Breeze So Often Breathes

lines.text: I look forward to your next visit. This splendid reverie is always open for you.
lines.quest_name: The Sacred Breeze So Often Breathes
